codeReview.summary: Implementation correctly merges/decrypts/sorts annotations, but viewer filtering is incomplete for `meal` event scoping versus the LLD mapping.

issues.description: LLD §9.2 requires `meal` annotations to be visible for `glucose`, `calories_consumed`, and any nutrition metric. The implementation only maps `meal` to `["glucose", "calories_consumed"]`, so viewers granted nutrition metrics such as `protein_g`, `carbs_g`, `fat_g`, etc. will incorrectly not see meal annotations.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The backend-worker skill mandates TDD (write failing tests before implementation), but this worker session implemented the service file before creating tests while still reporting `skillFeedback.followedProcedure: true`.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton order shows `Create src/lib/dashboard/annotations.ts` followed by `Create src/lib/dashboard/__tests__/annotations.test.ts`, with no prior failing-test run; handoff skillFeedback marks followedProcedure true.

summary: Review failed due to a blocking viewer-scope mismatch: `meal` annotation visibility does not honor the LLD requirement for any nutrition metric grants.
